name: Breadcrumb
description: Navigation trail showing current location in a hierarchy

items.description: Breadcrumb entries, from root to current page.

separator.description: Custom separator between items. Defaults to "/".

membrane.description: Wrap breadcrumb options (link/current) with membrane spacing.

allowNavigation.description: Allow real browser navigation on link click. Defaults to false for sandbox/demo safety.

className.description: Additional class name on the root element.

collapseAfter.description: Collapse middle crumbs after this many visible entries.
